data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Conversion linkage to orders and rewards', but the evidence provided does not confirm this linkage. While there are successful booking records, there is no explicit evidence showing how these bookings are linked to rewards or how conversions are tracked in relation to orders. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage as the necessary evidence to support the linkage is absent.
gaps: No evidence of conversion linkage to orders and rewards.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
